CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW public.moment_helped AS  WITH ev AS (
         SELECT se.session_id,
            bool_or(se.action_type = ANY (ARRAY['opened'::gaia_action_type, 'chosen'::gaia_action_type, 'external_open'::gaia_action_type])) AS engaged_resource,
            bool_or(se.action_type = 'helpful'::gaia_action_type) AS had_helpful,
            bool_or(se.action_type = 'saved'::gaia_action_type) AS had_saved
           FROM session_events se
          GROUP BY se.session_id
        )
 SELECT s.id AS session_id,
    s.user_id,
    s.created_at,
    s.state,
    s.area,
    s.time_bucket,
    s.had_no_match,
    s.state IS NOT NULL AND s.area IS NOT NULL AND s.time_bucket IS NOT NULL AS checkin_completed,
    COALESCE(ev.engaged_resource, false) AS engaged_resource,
    COALESCE(ev.had_helpful, false) AS had_helpful,
    COALESCE(ev.had_saved, false) AS had_saved,
    s.state IS NOT NULL AND s.area IS NOT NULL AND s.time_bucket IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(ev.engaged_resource, false) AND (COALESCE(ev.had_helpful, false) OR COALESCE(ev.had_saved, false)) AS is_moment_helped
   FROM sessions s
     LEFT JOIN ev ON ev.session_id = s.id;;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW public.session_outcomes AS  SELECT session_id,
    (array_agg(resource_id ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC) FILTER (WHERE action_type = 'chosen'::gaia_action_type AND resource_id IS NOT NULL))[1] AS chosen_resource_id,
    (array_agg(feedback ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC) FILTER (WHERE (action_type = ANY (ARRAY['helpful'::gaia_action_type, 'reject'::gaia_action_type])) AND feedback IS NOT NULL))[1] AS feedback,
    bool_or(action_type = 'saved'::gaia_action_type) AS saved,
    (array_agg(action_type ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC))[1] AS last_action,
    max(created_at) AS last_event_at
   FROM session_events e
  GROUP BY session_id;;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW public.v_community_cards AS  SELECT r.id AS resource_id,
    r.title,
    r.author,
    r.provider,
    r.url,
    r.lang,
    r.tier,
    r.is_core,
    r.format,
    r.duration_min,
    r.tags,
    r.when_it_helps,
    r.what_it_is_not,
    r.metadata AS resource_metadata,
    rc.access_mode,
    rc.booking_url,
    rc.contact,
    rc.price_type,
    rc.price_min,
    rc.price_max,
    rc.currency,
    rc.schedule_type,
    rc.start_at,
    rc.end_at,
    rc.window_start,
    rc.window_end,
    rc.delivery_mode,
    rc.country,
    rc.city,
    rc.venue,
    rc.location_lat,
    rc.location_lng,
    rc.online_url,
    rc.capacity,
    rc.rsvp_mode,
    rc.metadata AS coordinable_metadata,
    rc.created_at,
    rc.updated_at,
    to_char(rc.start_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY'::text) AS start_date_text,
    to_char(rc.end_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY'::text) AS end_date_text,
        CASE
            WHEN rc.start_at IS NOT NULL AND rc.end_at IS NOT NULL THEN (to_char(rc.start_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY'::text) || ' - '::text) || to_char(rc.end_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY'::text)
            WHEN rc.start_at IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(rc.start_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY'::text)
            WHEN rc.window_start IS NOT NULL AND rc.window_end IS NOT NULL THEN (to_char(rc.window_start::timestamp with time zone, 'DD/MM/YYYY'::text) || ' - '::text) || to_char(rc.window_end::timestamp with time zone, 'DD/MM/YYYY'::text)
            WHEN rc.window_start IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(rc.window_start::timestamp with time zone, 'DD/MM/YYYY'::text)
            ELSE NULL::text
        END AS date_label
   FROM resources r
     JOIN resource_coordinables rc ON rc.resource_id = r.id;;

    r.exposure_level,
    r.metadata,
    rc.booking_url,
    rc.contact,
    rc.price_type,

    rc.price_max,
    rc.currency,
    rc.schedule_type,
    rc.start_at,

    rc.window_end,

    rc.country,
    rc.city,
    rc.venue,

    r.author,
    r.provider,
    r.url,
    r.lang,
    r.format,
    r.duration_min,
    r.areas,
    r.when_it_helps,
    r.what_it_is_not
   FROM sanctuary_items si
     JOIN resources r ON si.resource_id = r.id;;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vault.decrypted_secrets AS  SELECT id,
    name,
    description,
    secret,
    convert_from(vault._crypto_aead_det_decrypt(message => decode(secret, 'base64'::text), additional => convert_to(id::text, 'utf8'::name), key_id => 0::bigint, context => '\x7067736f6469756d'::bytea, nonce => nonce), 'utf8'::name) AS decrypted_secret,
    key_id,
    nonce,
    created_at,
    updated_at
   FROM vault.secrets s;;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_candidate_interventions(p_state gaia_state, p_area life_area DEFAULT NULL::life_area)
 RETURNS text[]
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  SELECT coalesce(array_agg(
           ik.key
           ORDER BY (p_area IS NOT NULL AND p_area = ANY(ik.allowed_areas)) DESC,
                    ik.key
         ), '{}')
  FROM public.intervention_keys ik
  WHERE ik.is_active
    AND p_state = ANY(ik.allowed_states);
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_create_session_and_recommendations(p_user_id uuid, p_mode gaia_mode, p_state gaia_state DEFAULT NULL::gaia_state, p_area life_area DEFAULT NULL::life_area, p_time_bucket time_bucket DEFAULT NULL::time_bucket)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
declare
  v_lang          text;
  v_avoid_tags    text[];
  v_pref_formats  resource_format[];
  v_session_id    uuid;
  v_max_mins      int;
  v_copy          text := null;
  v_fmt_w         jsonb;
  v_ik_w          jsonb;            -- ŌŚĆ B1: pesos por intervention_key (sanctuary)
  v_cand_int      text[];          -- ŌŚĆ B1: intervenciones candidatas (estado+├Īrea)
  v_target_hi     text[];          -- ŌŚĆ B1: intents objetivo del estado
  v_recs          jsonb := '[]'::jsonb;
  v_fallback      int  := 0;
  v_rec_count     int  := 0;
  v_had_no_match  boolean := false;
begin
  if p_mode = 'propose' then
    if p_state is null or p_area is null or p_time_bucket is null then
      raise exception 'Propose requiere state, area y time_bucket';
    end if;
  end if;

  select u.lang, u.avoid_tags, u.preferred_formats
    into v_lang, v_avoid_tags, v_pref_formats
  from public.users u where u.id = p_user_id;

  if v_lang is null then
    raise exception 'User profile missing in public.users for id %', p_user_id;
  end if;

  insert into public.user_weights(user_id) values (p_user_id)
  on conflict (user_id) do nothing;

  select format_weights, intervention_key_weights
    into v_fmt_w, v_ik_w
  from public.user_weights where user_id = p_user_id;

  insert into public.sessions(user_id, mode, state, area, time_bucket, fallback_level, gaia_copy)
  values (p_user_id, p_mode, p_state, p_area, p_time_bucket, 0, null)
  returning id into v_session_id;

  if p_mode = 'presence' then
    v_copy := 'Estoy ac├Ī. Si quer├®s, hoy podemos simplemente estar.';
    update public.sessions set gaia_copy = v_copy where id = v_session_id;
    return jsonb_build_object('session_id', v_session_id, 'mode', p_mode,
      'gaia_copy', v_copy, 'fallback_level', 0, 'recommendations', jsonb_build_array());
  end if;

  if p_mode = 'no_intervention' then
    v_copy := 'No tengo nada mejor que agregar ahora. Si quer├®s, qued├®monos un momento.';
    update public.sessions set gaia_copy = v_copy where id = v_session_id;
    return jsonb_build_object('session_id', v_session_id, 'mode', p_mode,
      'gaia_copy', v_copy, 'fallback_level', 0, 'recommendations', jsonb_build_array());
  end if;

  v_max_mins  := public.gaia_max_minutes(p_time_bucket);
  -- ŌŚĆ B1: resolvers data-driven (Patch A)
  v_cand_int  := public.gaia_candidate_interventions(p_state, p_area);
  v_target_hi := public.gaia_target_help_intents(p_state);

  with
  last_session as (
    select s.id as sid from public.sessions s
    where s.user_id = p_user_id and s.id <> v_session_id and s.mode = 'propose'
    order by s.created_at desc limit 1
  ),
  last_shown as (
    select sr.resource_id from public.session_recommendations sr
    join last_session ls on ls.sid = sr.session_id
  ),
  neg_feedback as (
    select distinct e.resource_id from public.session_events e
    where e.user_id = p_user_id and e.action_type = 'reject' and e.resource_id is not null
  ),
  saved as (select distinct si.resource_id from public.sanctuary_items si where si.user_id = p_user_id),
  seen_before as (
    select distinct sr.resource_id from public.session_recommendations sr
    join public.sessions s on s.id = sr.session_id where s.user_id = p_user_id
  ),
  base as (
    select r.*,
      -- layer (se preserva: alimenta filtro layer<4, exploraci├│n y fallback_level)
      case
        when (p_state = any(r.states) and p_area = any(r.areas)) then 0
        when (p_state = any(r.states) and p_area = any(public.gaia_neighbor_areas(p_area))) then 1
        when (public.gaia_neighbor_states(p_state) && r.states and p_area = any(r.areas)) then 2
        when (r.is_core = true and r.tier = 'A'::resource_tier) then 4
        else 99
      end::smallint as layer,

      -- ŌŚĆ B1 ┬Ę COMPONENTES DE SCORING ACOTADOS ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ
      -- state_area (0-4)
      case
        when (p_state = any(r.states) and p_area = any(r.areas)) then 4
        when (p_state = any(r.states) and p_area = any(public.gaia_neighbor_areas(p_area))) then 3
        when (public.gaia_neighbor_states(p_state) && r.states and p_area = any(r.areas)) then 2
        else 0
      end::numeric as sc_state_area,

      -- help_intent (0-2): direcci├│n preferible del estado (curada)
      case when r.help_intent is not null and r.help_intent::text = any(v_target_hi)
           then 2 else 0 end::numeric as sc_help_intent,

      -- intervention_key (0-3): candidata; 3 si adem├Īs matchea ├Īrea, 1.5 si solo estado
      case
        when p_area = any(ik.allowed_areas) then 3
        else 1.5
      end::numeric as sc_intervention,

      -- duration_fit (0-2)
      greatest(0, least(public.gaia_duration_bonus(r.duration_min), 2))::numeric as sc_duration,

      -- format_preference (-1..1.5)
      greatest(-1, least(coalesce((v_fmt_w ->> (r.format::text))::numeric, 0) / 10.0, 1.5))::numeric as sc_format,

      -- resource_quality (0-2): agregado de resource_stats
      least(coalesce(rs.helpful_count,0)*0.5 + coalesce(rs.saved_count,0)*0.5, 2)::numeric as sc_quality,

      -- sanctuary (0-2): peso aprendido por intervention_key (cold-start = 0)
      least(coalesce((v_ik_w ->> r.intervention_key)::numeric, 0) / 5.0, 2)::numeric as sc_sanctuary,

      -- flags
      (r.id = any(select resource_id from last_shown)) as shown_last_session,
      (r.id = any(select resource_id from neg_feedback)) as had_neg_feedback,
      (r.id = any(select resource_id from saved)) as is_saved,
      (r.id = any(select resource_id from seen_before)) as is_repeat
    from public.resources r
    left join public.intervention_keys ik on ik.key = r.intervention_key
    left join public.resource_stats   rs on rs.resource_id = r.id
    where r.is_active = true and r.lang = v_lang and r.duration_min <= v_max_mins
      and (v_avoid_tags is null or not (r.tags && v_avoid_tags))
      and (v_pref_formats is null or r.format = any(v_pref_formats))
      -- ŌŚĆ B1 ┬Ę GATE GOLDEN PATH (columnas) + candidatura de intervenci├│n
      and r.depth_level = 'immediate'::public.depth_level
      and r.is_direct_action = true
      and r.risk_level = 'low'::public.risk_level
      and r.source_trust_level is not null
      and r.source_trust_level <> 'lumen_origin'::public.source_trust_level
      and r.minimum_step is not null
      and r.show_in_first_session = true
      and r.intervention_key = any(v_cand_int)
  ),
  candidates as (
    select b.*,
      b.sc_state_area as score_match,
      b.sc_format     as score_weights,
      (b.sc_help_intent + b.sc_intervention + b.sc_quality + b.sc_sanctuary) as score_preferences,
      (b.sc_state_area + b.sc_help_intent + b.sc_intervention + b.sc_duration
       + b.sc_format + b.sc_quality + b.sc_sanctuary
       + case when b.is_repeat then -1 else 0 end) as score_total
    from base b
    where b.layer < 4
      and b.shown_last_session = false
      and b.had_neg_feedback = false
      and b.is_saved = false
  ),
  ranked as (
    select c.*, row_number() over (order by (case when c.is_repeat then 0 else 1 end) desc, c.score_total desc) as rn
    from candidates c
  ),
  safe as (select * from ranked where rn <= 2),
  safe_pos as (select row_number() over (order by rn)::smallint as position, * from safe),
  remaining as (select r.* from ranked r where r.id not in (select id from safe)),
  exploration as (
    select rem.* from remaining rem where rem.format <> all(select format from safe)
    order by rem.rn limit 1
  ),
  third_pool as (
    select * from exploration
    union all
    select * from remaining where not exists (select 1 from exploration)
  ),
  third_pick as (select * from third_pool order by rn limit 1),
  final_picks as (
    select sp.position, sp.id as resource_id, sp.layer,
      sp.score_total, sp.score_match, sp.score_weights, sp.score_preferences,
      false as is_exploration, sp.is_repeat, sp.format
    from safe_pos sp
    union all
    select 3::smallint, tp.id, tp.layer,
      tp.score_total, tp.score_match, tp.score_weights, tp.score_preferences,
      (tp.format <> all(select format from safe)), tp.is_repeat, tp.format
    from third_pick tp
  )
  insert into public.session_recommendations(
    session_id, position, resource_id, layer,
    score_total, score_match, score_weights, score_preferences,
    is_exploration, is_repeat, repeat_reason
  )
  select v_session_id, fp.position, fp.resource_id, fp.layer,
    fp.score_total, fp.score_match, fp.score_weights, fp.score_preferences,
    fp.is_exploration, fp.is_repeat,
    case when fp.is_repeat then 'seen_before' else null end
  from final_picks fp;

  -- shown_count (Patch V2, preservado)
  insert into public.resource_stats(resource_id, shown_count, updated_at)
  select sr.resource_id, 1, now()
  from public.session_recommendations sr where sr.session_id = v_session_id
  on conflict (resource_id) do update
    set shown_count = resource_stats.shown_count + 1, updated_at = now();

  select coalesce(max(sr.layer), 0) into v_fallback
  from public.session_recommendations sr where sr.session_id = v_session_id;

  select count(*) into v_rec_count
  from public.session_recommendations where session_id = v_session_id;

  v_had_no_match := (v_rec_count = 0);

  if v_had_no_match then
    insert into public.session_events(user_id, session_id, action_type, resource_id, created_at)
    values (p_user_id, v_session_id, 'no_match'::gaia_action_type, null, now());
  end if;

  v_copy := case
    when v_had_no_match
      then 'Hoy no tengo algo suficientemente claro y respaldado para esto. Prefiero no forzarlo.'
    when v_fallback >= 3
      then 'No tengo algo exacto. Te propongo lo m├Īs cercano que tengo.'
    when v_fallback >= 1
      then 'No es exactamente para esto, pero puede ayudarte ahora.'
    else 'Podr├Łas empezar por esto. Es peque├▒o y suficiente por ahora.'
  end;

  update public.sessions
    set fallback_level = v_fallback, gaia_copy = v_copy, had_no_match = v_had_no_match
  where id = v_session_id;

  select jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('position', sr.position, 'resource_id', sr.resource_id) order by sr.position)
    into v_recs
  from public.session_recommendations sr where sr.session_id = v_session_id;

  return jsonb_build_object(
    'session_id', v_session_id, 'mode', p_mode, 'gaia_copy', v_copy,
    'fallback_level', v_fallback, 'had_no_match', v_had_no_match,
    'recommendations', coalesce(v_recs, '[]'::jsonb)
  );
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_decay_weights_monthly(p_factor numeric DEFAULT 0.9)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$begin
  update public.user_weights uw
  set
    format_weights = (
      select coalesce(
        jsonb_object_agg(k, to_jsonb(round((v::numeric)*p_factor)::int)),
        '{}'::jsonb
      )
      from jsonb_each_text(uw.format_weights) e(k,v)
    ),
    updated_at = now();
end;$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_dismiss_session(p_session_id uuid, p_reason text DEFAULT 'other_options'::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$declare
  v_user_id uuid;
begin
  select user_id into v_user_id
  from public.sessions
  where id = p_session_id;

  if v_user_id is null then
    raise exception 'Session not found: %', p_session_id;
  end if;

  -- insertar un evento dismissed por cada recomendaci├│n de esa sesi├│n
  insert into public.session_events(session_id, user_id, action_type, resource_id, metadata)
  select
    sr.session_id,
    v_user_id,
    'dismissed'::gaia_action_type,
    sr.resource_id,
    jsonb_build_object('reason', p_reason)
  from public.session_recommendations sr
  where sr.session_id = p_session_id;

  -- (opcional, suave) subir streak 1 para habilitar "presence/no_intervention" si insiste
  update public.user_weights
  set recent_reject_streak = recent_reject_streak + 1,
      updated_at = now()
  where user_id = v_user_id;

  return jsonb_build_object('ok', true, 'session_id', p_session_id);
end;$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_duration_bonus(mins integer)
 RETURNS numeric
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  -- bonus suave por ser corto (MVP: sesiones breves)
  select case
    when mins <= 3 then 1.2
    when mins <= 7 then 0.8
    when mins <= 12 then 0.3
    else 0.0
  end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_get_resource_card(p_user_id uuid, p_resource_id uuid, p_session_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
declare
  v_r record;
  v_is_saved boolean := false;
  v_is_repeat boolean := false;
  v_was_negative boolean := false;
  v_was_shown_last boolean := false;
  v_last_session_id uuid;
  v_session_state gaia_state;
  v_help_intent help_intent;
  v_why_now text;
  v_minimum_step text;
  v_after_prompt text;
begin
  -- 1) Recurso base (+ intervention_key y source_trust_level)
  select
    r.id, r.title, r.author, r.provider, r.url, r.lang,
    r.tier, r.is_core, r.format, r.duration_min,
    r.states, r.areas, r.tags,
    r.when_it_helps, r.what_it_is_not,
    r.metadata, r.source_kind,
    r.why_now, r.minimum_step, r.after_prompt, r.help_intent,
    r.intervention_key, r.source_trust_level                    -- ŌŚĆ NUEVO
  into v_r
  from public.resources r
  where r.id = p_resource_id;

  if v_r.id is null then
    raise exception 'Resource not found: %', p_resource_id;
  end if;

  select exists(
    select 1 from public.sanctuary_items si
    where si.user_id = p_user_id and si.resource_id = p_resource_id
  ) into v_is_saved;

  select exists(
    select 1 from public.session_recommendations sr
    join public.sessions s on s.id = sr.session_id
    where s.user_id = p_user_id and sr.resource_id = p_resource_id
  ) into v_is_repeat;

  select exists(
    select 1 from public.session_events e
    where e.user_id = p_user_id and e.resource_id = p_resource_id
      and e.feedback = 'no_me_sirvio'::feedback_type
  ) into v_was_negative;

  select s.id into v_last_session_id
  from public.sessions s
  where s.user_id = p_user_id and s.mode = 'propose'
    and (p_session_id is null or s.id <> p_session_id)
  order by s.created_at desc limit 1;

  if v_last_session_id is not null then
    select exists(
      select 1 from public.session_recommendations sr
      where sr.session_id = v_last_session_id and sr.resource_id = p_resource_id
    ) into v_was_shown_last;
  end if;

  -- 6) Resoluci├│n de los 4 campos de acci├│n (fallback al vuelo) ŌĆö preservada
  if p_session_id is not null then
    select s.state into v_session_state
    from public.sessions s where s.id = p_session_id;
  end if;

  v_help_intent := v_r.help_intent;

  if v_help_intent is null then
    begin
      v_help_intent := (v_r.metadata ->> 'suggested_help_type')::help_intent;
    exception when others then
      v_help_intent := null;
    end;
  end if;

  if v_help_intent is null and v_session_state is not null then
    v_help_intent := case v_session_state
      when 'cargado'    then 'calmar'
      when 'ansioso'    then 'calmar'
      when 'irritado'   then 'calmar'
      when 'confundido' then 'ordenar'
      when 'cansado'    then 'energizar'
      when 'bajo'       then 'energizar'
      when 'solo'       then 'conectar'
      when 'bien'       then 'expandir'
      when 'abierto'    then 'expandir'
      else null
    end::help_intent;
  end if;

  v_why_now := coalesce(nullif(trim(v_r.why_now), ''), nullif(trim(v_r.when_it_helps), ''));

  v_minimum_step := coalesce(
    nullif(trim(v_r.minimum_step), ''),
    case v_r.format::text
      when 'audio'     then 'Escuch├Ī los primeros minutos. Si no conecta, lo dej├Īs.'
      when 'video'     then 'Mir├Ī el comienzo. No hace falta terminarlo.'
      when 'texto'     then 'Le├® el primer p├Īrrafo. Con eso alcanza para empezar.'
      when 'article'   then 'Le├® el primer p├Īrrafo. Con eso alcanza para empezar.'
      when 'practica'  then 'Prob├Ī la primera parte. Un ratito basta.'
      else 'Empez├Ī por un pedacito. No ten├®s que hacer todo.'
    end
  );

  v_after_prompt := coalesce(
    nullif(trim(v_r.after_prompt), ''),
    case v_help_intent
      when 'calmar'    then '┬┐Te dej├│ un poco m├Īs en calma?'
      when 'ordenar'   then '┬┐Quedaste con un poco m├Īs de claridad?'
      when 'energizar' then '┬┐Sent├Łs un poco m├Īs de energ├Ła?'
      when 'conectar'  then '┬┐Te sent├Łs un poco m├Īs acompa├▒ado?'
      when 'orientar'  then '┬┐Ves un poco m├Īs el camino?'
      when 'expandir'  then '┬┐Te abri├│ algo nuevo?'
      else '┬┐Te dej├│ un poco mejor?'
    end
  );

  -- 7) Output (+ Fuente + intervention_key)
  return jsonb_build_object(
    'id', v_r.id,
    'title', v_r.title,
    'author', v_r.author,
    'provider', v_r.provider,
    'url', v_r.url,
    'lang', v_r.lang,
    'tier', v_r.tier::text,
    'is_core', v_r.is_core,
    'format', v_r.format::text,
    'duration_min', v_r.duration_min,
    'states', v_r.states,
    'areas', v_r.areas,
    'tags', v_r.tags,
    'when_it_helps', v_r.when_it_helps,
    'what_it_is_not', v_r.what_it_is_not,
    'metadata', v_r.metadata,
    'source_kind', v_r.source_kind,
    'why_now',      v_why_now,
    'minimum_step', v_minimum_step,
    'after_prompt', v_after_prompt,
    'help_intent',  v_help_intent::text,
    'intervention_key', v_r.intervention_key,                  -- ŌŚĆ NUEVO
    'source', jsonb_strip_nulls(jsonb_build_object(            -- ŌŚĆ NUEVO
      'name',        v_r.metadata #>> '{source,name}',
      'reference',   v_r.metadata #>> '{source,reference}',
      'basis',       v_r.metadata #>> '{source,basis}',
      'trust_level', v_r.source_trust_level::text
    )),
    'flags', jsonb_build_object(
      'is_saved', v_is_saved,
      'is_repeat', v_is_repeat,
      'was_negative', v_was_negative,
      'was_shown_last', v_was_shown_last
    )
  );
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_help_intent_score(p_resource_meta jsonb, p_targets text[])
 RETURNS numeric
 LANGUAGE sql
 IMMUTABLE
AS $function$
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN p_targets IS NULL OR cardinality(p_targets) = 0 THEN 0
    WHEN coalesce(p_resource_meta->>'suggested_help_type', '') = ANY(p_targets) THEN 1.0
    ELSE 0
  END
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_max_minutes(tb time_bucket)
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  SELECT CASE tb
    WHEN 't2_5'::public.time_bucket    THEN 5
    WHEN 't5_15'::public.time_bucket   THEN 15
    WHEN 't15_plus'::public.time_bucket THEN 999  -- sin l├Łmite efectivo
    ELSE 15
  END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_neighbor_areas(a life_area)
 RETURNS life_area[]
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$select case a
    when 'trabajo_obra'   then array['sentido_valores'::life_area,'cuerpo_energia'::life_area]
    when 'vinculos'       then array['mente_emocion'::life_area,'gozo_vida'::life_area]
    when 'cuerpo_energia' then array['mente_emocion'::life_area, 'gozo_vida'::life_area]
    when 'mente_emocion'  then array['cuerpo_energia'::life_area,'sentido_valores'::life_area]
    when 'sentido_valores'then array['trabajo_obra'::life_area,'gozo_vida'::life_area]
    when 'gozo_vida'      then array['sentido_valores'::life_area,'vinculos'::life_area]
    else array[]::life_area[]
  end;$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.gaia_neighbor_states(s gaia_state)
 RETURNS gaia_state[]
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select case s
    when 'cargado'    then array['ansioso'::gaia_state,'cansado'::gaia_state,'confundido'::gaia_state]
    when 'ansioso'    then array['cargado'::gaia_state,'irritado'::gaia_state,'confundido'::gaia_state]
    when 'cansado'    then array['bajo'::gaia_state,'cargado'::gaia_state]
    when 'irritado'   then array['ansioso'::gaia_state,'cargado'::gaia_state]
    when 'bajo'       then array['cansado'::gaia_state,'solo'::gaia_state]
    when 'solo'       then array['bajo'::gaia_state,'ansioso'::gaia_state]
    when 'confundido' then array['cargado'::gaia_state,'ansioso'::gaia_state,'bien'::gaia_state]
    when 'bien'       then array['abierto'::gaia_state,'confundido'::gaia_state]
    when 'abierto'    then array['bien'::gaia_state]
    else array[]::gaia_state[]
  end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_auth_user()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
  insert into public.users (id, lang, avoid_tags)
  values (new.id, 'es', '{}'::text[])
  on conflict (id) do nothing;

  insert into public.user_weights (user_id)
  values (new.id)
  on conflict (user_id) do nothing;

  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN

  VALUES (NEW.id)

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_dispatch(p_action text, p_params jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_fn     text;
  v_result jsonb;
BEGIN
  -- Sanitizar y construir el nombre de funci├│n
  -- 'go_home'     ŌåÆ 'lumi_go_home'
  -- 'open_faros'  ŌåÆ 'lumi_open_faros'
  v_fn := 'lumi_' || regexp_replace(
    lower(trim(p_action)),
    '[^a-z0-9_]', '_', 'g'
  );

  -- Ejecutar din├Īmicamente ŌĆö cero knowledge del dispatcher
  BEGIN
    EXECUTE format('SELECT public.%I($1)', v_fn)
    INTO   v_result
    USING  p_params;

  EXCEPTION
    -- Funci├│n no existe: mensaje claro
    WHEN undefined_function THEN
      RETURN public.lumi_get_node('HOME_DEFAULT')
        || jsonb_build_object(
             'ok',    false,
             'error', 'action_not_found: ' || v_fn,
             'state', '{}'::jsonb
           );

    -- Cualquier otro error: revelar la causa real
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
      RETURN public.lumi_get_node('HOME_DEFAULT')
        || jsonb_build_object(
             'ok',    false,
             'error', 'dispatch_error: ' || v_fn || ' / ' || SQLSTATE || ' / ' || SQLERRM,
             'state', '{}'::jsonb
           );
  END;

  RETURN coalesce(v_result, public.lumi_get_node('HOME_DEFAULT'));
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_circulos_activities(p_area text DEFAULT ''::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_items jsonb;
BEGIN
  SELECT coalesce(
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id',               r.id::text,
        'title',            r.title,
        'description_short', coalesce(r.description_short, ''),
        'modalidad_label',
          CASE rc.delivery_mode
            WHEN 'online'    THEN 'Virtual'
            WHEN 'in_person' THEN 'Presencial'
            WHEN 'hybrid'    THEN 'H├Łbrido'
            ELSE 'Presencial'
          END,
        'fecha_label',
          CASE
            WHEN rc.start_at IS NOT NULL
            THEN to_char(rc.start_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires',
                         'DD/MM ┬Ę HH24:MI hs')
            ELSE 'Pr├│ximamente'
          END,
        'join_url',         coalesce(rc.online_url, rc.booking_url, rc.contact, ''),
        'city',             coalesce(rc.city, ''),
        'action',           'open_activity'
      )
      ORDER BY rc.start_at ASC NULLS LAST
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  )
  INTO v_items
  FROM  public.resources r
  JOIN  public.resource_coordinables rc ON rc.resource_id = r.id
  WHERE r.is_active = true
    AND r.tier = 'A'
    AND (
      rc.start_at IS NULL
      OR rc.start_at > now()
    )
    AND CASE
          WHEN p_area != '' THEN p_area::life_area = ANY(r.areas)
          ELSE TRUE
        END;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'type',   'activity_list',
    'source', 'circulos',
    'items',  v_items
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_faros(p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_faros jsonb;
BEGIN
  -- Genera las 6 ├Īreas siempre, con texto del faro si existe
  -- Usa ui_copy para los labels ŌĆö fuente de verdad
  SELECT jsonb_agg(
    jsonb_build_object(
      'area',      uc.key,
      'label',     coalesce(uc.long_label, uc.short_label, uc.key),
      'faro_text', coalesce(f.faro_text, ''),
      'has_faro',  (f.faro_text IS NOT NULL AND f.faro_text != '')
    )
    ORDER BY uc.sort_order
  )
  INTO v_faros
  FROM public.ui_copy uc
  LEFT JOIN public.user_area_faros f
         ON f.area::text = uc.key
        AND f.user_id = p_user_id
  WHERE uc.domain = 'life_area'
    AND uc.lang   = 'es'
    AND uc.key    != ''; -- excluir 'Sin ├Īrea'

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'type',  'faros_panel',
    'faros', coalesce(v_faros, '[]'::jsonb)
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_message(p_message_type text, p_moment_type text)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_text text;
BEGIN
  -- Random ponderado: -ln(random())/weight es el algoritmo est├Īndar
  -- para weighted reservoir sampling. random_weight DEFAULT 1.
  SELECT message_text INTO v_text
  FROM public.lumen_messages
  WHERE message_type = p_message_type
    AND moment_type  = p_moment_type
    AND active = true
    AND (starts_at IS NULL OR starts_at <= now())
    AND (ends_at   IS NULL OR ends_at   >= now())
  ORDER BY -ln(greatest(random(), 0.0000001)) /
           greatest(coalesce(random_weight, 1), 1)
  LIMIT 1;

  RETURN v_text;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_node(p_code text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_node         public.lumen_nodes%rowtype;
  v_message      text;
  v_content_type text;
BEGIN
  SELECT *
  INTO v_node
  FROM public.lumen_nodes
  WHERE code = p_code
    AND coalesce(active, true) = true   -- ŌŚĆ’ĖÅ defensivo: NULL = activo
  ORDER BY priority ASC
  LIMIT 1;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
      'ok', false,
      'error', 'NODE_NOT_FOUND',
      'code', p_code,
      'message', 'Estoy ac├Ī.',
      'actions', '[]'::jsonb,
      'content_type', 'empty_presence',
      'content', jsonb_build_object('type', 'empty_presence')
    );
  END IF;

  v_message := coalesce(v_node.message_text, '');
  v_content_type := coalesce(v_node.content_json ->> 'type', 'empty_presence');

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true,
    'code', v_node.code,
    'title', v_node.title,
    'module', v_node.module,
    'node_type', v_node.node_type,
    'moment_type', v_node.moment_type,
    'message', v_message,
    'actions', coalesce(v_node.actions_json, '[]'::jsonb),
    'content_type', v_content_type,
    'content', coalesce(v_node.content_json, jsonb_build_object('type', 'empty_presence')),
    'metadata', coalesce(v_node.metadata, '{}'::jsonb)
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_note_editor(p_user_id uuid, p_resource_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_note text := '';
  v_area text := '';
  v_title text;
BEGIN
  -- Leer nota y ├Īrea actuales del item
  SELECT coalesce(si.note, ''), coalesce(si.area::text, '')
  INTO   v_note, v_area
  FROM   public.sanctuary_items si
  WHERE  si.resource_id = p_resource_id AND si.user_id = p_user_id
  LIMIT  1;

  -- T├Łtulo del recurso para contexto
  SELECT coalesce(r.title, 'Recurso')
  INTO   v_title
  FROM   public.resources r
  WHERE  r.id = p_resource_id;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'type',         'note_editor',
    'resource_id',  p_resource_id::text,
    'title',        coalesce(v_title, 'Recurso'),
    'current_note', v_note,
    'current_area', v_area
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_resource_card(p_user_id uuid, p_resource_id uuid, p_session_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid, p_is_from text DEFAULT 'lumi'::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_base jsonb;
  v_desc text;
  v_sk   text;
BEGIN
  v_base := public.gaia_get_resource_card(p_user_id, p_resource_id, p_session_id);

  SELECT coalesce(r.description_short, ''), coalesce(r.source_kind, 'external_url')
  INTO   v_desc, v_sk
  FROM   public.resources r
  WHERE  r.id = p_resource_id;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'type',              'resource_card',
    'resource_id',       (v_base->>'id'),
    'title',             coalesce(v_base->>'title', 'Recurso'),
    'description_short', v_desc,
    'when_it_helps',     coalesce(v_base->>'when_it_helps', ''),
    'what_it_is_not',    coalesce(v_base->>'what_it_is_not', ''),
    'format',            coalesce(v_base->>'format', 'ŌĆö'),
    'duration_min',      coalesce(v_base->>'duration_min', 'ŌĆö'),
    'source_kind',       v_sk,
    'url',               coalesce(v_base->>'url', ''),
    'areas',             coalesce(v_base->'areas', '[]'::jsonb),
    'is_from',           p_is_from,

    -- ŌŚĆ NUEVO ┬Ę Capa de acci├│n (antes se descartaba)
    'intervention_key',  v_base->>'intervention_key',
    'why_now',           coalesce(v_base->>'why_now', ''),
    'minimum_step',      coalesce(v_base->>'minimum_step', ''),
    'after_prompt',      coalesce(v_base->>'after_prompt', ''),
    'help_intent',       v_base->>'help_intent',

    -- ŌŚĆ NUEVO ┬Ę Fuente (paso respaldado)
    'source_name',        v_base#>>'{source,name}',
    'source_reference',   v_base#>>'{source,reference}',   -- URL o cita can├│nica
    'source_basis',       v_base#>>'{source,basis}',
    'source_trust_level', v_base#>>'{source,trust_level}',

    -- ŌŚĆ NUEVO ┬Ę CTAs (┬¦15)
    'cta_label',           'Empezar ahora',
    'secondary_cta_label', 'Probemos otra cosa',

    -- Flags (preservados)
    'is_saved',         coalesce((v_base->'flags'->>'is_saved')::boolean, false),
    'is_repeat',        coalesce((v_base->'flags'->>'is_repeat')::boolean, false),
    'was_negative',     coalesce((v_base->'flags'->>'was_negative')::boolean, false),
    'was_shown_last',   coalesce((v_base->'flags'->>'was_shown_last')::boolean, false),
    'session_id',       coalesce(p_session_id::text, '')
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_sanctuary(p_user_id uuid, p_area text DEFAULT ''::text, p_nota text DEFAULT ''::text, p_orden text DEFAULT 'recientes'::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN public.lumi_open_sanctuary(jsonb_build_object(
    'user_id',          p_user_id::text,
    'filter_area',      CASE WHEN p_area = 'sin_area' THEN '' ELSE coalesce(p_area, '') END,
    'filter_format',    '',
    'filter_has_note',  CASE
                          WHEN p_nota = 'con_nota' THEN 'yes'
                          WHEN p_nota = 'sin_nota' THEN 'no'
                          ELSE ''
                        END
  ));
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_get_sanctuary_item(p_item_id uuid, p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_item record;
  v_r    record;
  v_note text;
  v_area text;
BEGIN
  SELECT si.id, si.note, si.area::text, si.resource_id
  INTO  v_item
  FROM  public.sanctuary_items si
  WHERE si.id = p_item_id AND si.user_id = p_user_id;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN RETURN NULL; END IF;

  SELECT r.id, r.title, r.description_short, r.format::text,
         r.duration_min, r.source_kind, r.url, r.when_it_helps
  INTO  v_r
  FROM  public.resources r
  WHERE r.id = v_item.resource_id;

  v_note := coalesce(v_item.note, '');
  v_area := coalesce(v_item.area, '');

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'type',             'sanctuary_detail',
    'sanctuary_item_id', v_item.id::text,
    'resource_id',       v_r.id::text,
    'title',            coalesce(v_r.title, 'Recurso guardado'),
    'description_short', coalesce(v_r.description_short, ''),
    'format',           coalesce(v_r.format, 'ŌĆö'),
    'duration_min',     coalesce(v_r.duration_min::text, 'ŌĆö'),
    'source_kind',      coalesce(v_r.source_kind, 'external_url'),
    'url',              coalesce(v_r.url, ''),
    'when_it_helps',    coalesce(v_r.when_it_helps, ''),
    'note',             v_note,
    'has_note',         (v_note != ''),
    'area',             v_area,
    'area_label',       CASE WHEN v_area != '' THEN public.lumi_area_label(v_area) ELSE '' END,
    'has_area',         (v_area != '')
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_open_sanctuary_item(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_result jsonb;
  v_has_note boolean;
BEGIN
  v_result := public.lumi_open_sanctuary_item(
    p_params->>'user_id',
    p_params->>'sanctuary_item_id'
  );
  -- La funci├│n existente ya devuelve el item completo
  -- Solo necesitamos elegir el nodo correcto seg├║n has_note
  v_has_note := coalesce((v_result->'content'->>'has_note')::boolean, false);
  RETURN public.lumi_get_node(
    CASE WHEN v_has_note
      THEN 'SANCTUARY_ITEM_WITH_NOTE'
      ELSE 'SANCTUARY_ITEM_WITHOUT_NOTE'
    END)
    || jsonb_build_object(
        'content', v_result->'content',
        'state',   v_result->'state');
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_save_to_sanctuary(p_user_id_text text, p_resource_id_text text, p_session_id_text text DEFAULT ''::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_user_id     uuid;
  v_resource_id uuid;
  v_session_id  uuid;
  v_item_id     uuid;
  v_node        jsonb;
  v_r           record;
BEGIN
  v_user_id     := nullif(trim(p_user_id_text), '')::uuid;
  v_resource_id := nullif(trim(both '''' from trim(coalesce(p_resource_id_text, ''))), '')::uuid;
  v_session_id  := nullif(trim(both '''' from trim(coalesce(p_session_id_text, ''))), '')::uuid;

  INSERT INTO public.sanctuary_items(user_id, resource_id)
  VALUES (v_user_id, v_resource_id)
  ON CONFLICT (user_id, resource_id)
  DO UPDATE SET updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id INTO v_item_id;

  IF v_session_id IS NOT NULL THEN
    PERFORM public.lumi_submit_session_action(
      p_session_id_text   := v_session_id::text,
      p_resource_id_text  := v_resource_id::text,
      p_feedback          := 'me_sirvio',
      p_saved             := true
    );
  END IF;

  SELECT r.id, r.title, r.description_short, r.format, r.duration_min, r.source_kind, r.url
  INTO   v_r
  FROM   public.resources r
  WHERE  r.id = v_resource_id;

  v_node := public.lumi_get_node('SANCTUARY_SAVED');

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'ok', true,
    'code', 'SANCTUARY_SAVED',
    'message', coalesce(v_node->>'message', 'Lo guard├® en tu Santuario.'),

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_share_resource(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN public.lumi_share_resource_text(
    coalesce(p_params->>'title', ''),
    coalesce(p_params->>'format', ''),
    coalesce(p_params->>'duration', ''),
    coalesce(p_params->>'url', '')
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_show_history(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN public.lumi_get_session_history(
    p_params->>'user_id',
    p_params->>'session_id'
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_skip_name(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN public.lumi_submit_name(p_params || jsonb_build_object('first_name', ''));
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_start_recommendation(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN public.lumi_start_recommendation(
    (p_params->>'user_id')::uuid,
    (p_params->>'checkin_state')::gaia_state,
    (p_params->>'checkin_area')::life_area,
    (p_params->>'checkin_time')::time_bucket
  );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_submit_contribution(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_result jsonb;
BEGIN
  v_result := public.lumi_submit_contribution(
    (p_params->>'user_id')::uuid,
    coalesce(p_params->>'contribution_title', ''),
    coalesce(p_params->>'contribution_url', ''),
    coalesce(p_params->>'contribution_why', '')
  );
  RETURN public.lumi_get_node(
    CASE WHEN (v_result->>'ok')::boolean
      THEN 'CONTRIBUTION_SUBMITTED'
      ELSE 'ERROR_SUBMIT_FAILED'
    END)
    || jsonb_build_object('state', '{}'::jsonb);
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.lumi_submit_session_action(p_params jsonb)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN public.lumi_submit_session_action(
    coalesce(p_params->>'session_id', ''),
    coalesce(p_params->>'resource_id', ''),
    coalesce(p_params->>'feedback', ''),
    coalesce((p_params->>'saved')::boolean, false)
  );
END;
$function$
